1.title: UniPharma (Hackathon)
1.description: Built an AI-powered system that automates prescription processing and medicine verification using OCR, NLP, and YOLO-based computer vision. The platform extracts medicine names from prescriptions and verifies dispensed drugs in real time, helping reduce manual work and potential dispensing errors. For pharmacist, username: pharm, password: ph@rm123. For admin, username: admin, password: admin@123.

2.title: NaingAirLine
2.description: An online flight booking platform built with React.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL. It features user authentication, flight search, booking management, and a responsive design for seamless user experience.

3.title: Hotel Booking & Golf Program Management System (Hackathon)
3.description: (As a front end developer) Developed a full-stack booking platform that allows users to reserve hotel rooms and golf programs, manage bookings, and view analytics through a centralized dashboard. The system also integrates an AI-powered assistant for FAQs, personalized recommendations, and dynamic pricing insights.

4.title: IoT Sonar System
4.description: An IoT Sonar built using a servo motor, HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor, and an ESP32 microcontroller. The radar scans its surroundings by rotating the servo motor while measuring distances with the ultrasonic sensor. The collected data is transmitted to a web interface for real-time visualization and monitoring.
